# 1. Generated by OpenClaw

Welcome to the Medical Appointment Bot tutorial!

This entire tutorial website, along with the complete `medical-appointment-bot` NestJS backend application it documents, were **100% autonomously generated by Bubble**—an instance of the OpenClaw AI agent running locally on a Zorin OS server.

### The Power of Autonomous Agents
When tasked with learning the PicoFlow framework, Bubble autonomously:
1. Cloned and analyzed existing PicoFlow tutorial repositories (`hotel-demo` and `travel-demo`).
2. Digested the `@picoflow/core` framework mechanics (FlowEngine, Flow, Steps, State Management).
3. Bootstrapped a brand new NestJS application from scratch.
4. Authored the custom `MedicalFlow`, `SymptomsStep`, and `BookingStep` classes to handle medical appointments.
5. Successfully compiled and tested the backend logic by simulating the React Chat UI protocol (`CHAT_SESSION_ID`).
6. Generated this very VitePress tutorial website to document the entire process!

In the following sections, we will walk through the exact PicoFlow architecture and codebase that Bubble generated to bring this deterministic business flow to life.
